flows.name: Home Page Load

steps: Verify page title or heading is visible

flows.name: Program Page Navigation

steps: Verify program details section is visible

flows.name: Contact Form Submission
flows.description: User fills and submits the contact/lead form

Fill in name, email, phone, program fields
